findingsSummary: Primary routing probe still returns sk-code-review top-1 for iterative review loop/spec folder audit, while shadow scoring favors deep-review. Adjacent sk-code-review and deep-research regression probes pass.

findingDetails.title: Primary deep-review routing still fails live behavioral top-1
findingDetails.evidence: Prompt `iterative review loop for spec folder audit` returned sk-code-review live 0.942 before deep-review live 0.936; shadow scores favor deep-review 0.838 over sk-code-review 0.819333, but behavioral ordering remains live-ranked.
